name: 24 Hour Pickleball Sugar Land
description: 24 Hour Pickle is the first ever 24/7 pickleball facility in Sugar Land, TX. Our vision is to create a 24/7 accessible pickleball experience for all ages and skill levels. We aim to become a leading, innovative platform and community for pickleball enthusiasts!
fees: Fee required — $5-$15 for Open Play and $50/hr for private court
